# SkillSwap

SkillSwap is a peer-to-peer skill and knowledge exchange platform. It allows users to list skills they offer and skills they want to learn, matching compatible partners for collaborative knowledge trade.

## Key Features
- Complementary matching algorithm
- Real-time chat & workspaces
- Integrated scheduling calendar
- Group study teams
- Reputation & badge rewards

## Developer & Design Documentation
- [Design Specifications](/Creative-Cards-DESIGN.md) - Design patterns and visual specifications.
- [Impact Design Specification](/Three-ways-to-make-an-impact-DESIGN.md) - Additional design implementation specs.
